Books

  • A Game of Thrones (mentioned)

Brandon Stark was a member of House Stark, the only son of Lord Willam Stark and his first wife, Lady Lyanne Glover.[3][4]

History[ ]

Brandon's mother died in childbirth, so Nan came to Winterfell to be his wet nurse. He died at age three of a summer chill.[2]
